DuvallJ's Blog

"This is a site yes"

home about contact archive tags

Privacy Policy

Who we are

Just me, Jack Duvall. My website address is https://user.tjhsst.edu/2019jduvall/ (you’re here!).

Analytics

What personal data we collect and why we collect it

Your IP address and content accessed will be logged. This is so I can see who is visiting my site.

Who we share your data with

No one, because I don’t believe in that sort of thing.

Additional information

How we protect your data

I have locked down the server to only be accessible through SSH key authentication on an unprivileged account. I run no other public services on the server besides Wordpress. If I ever get a new server, I will set up full-disk encryption just in case.

What data breach procedures we have in place

None, because to be honest there is almost no sensitive data on this website. I have most everything backed up too.

What third parties we receive data from

None, because I don’t care about your data.

What automated decision making and/or profiling we do with user data

None. It’s just me looking at the server logs.

Github: duvallj
